name: python3-vobject
title: python3-vobject
summary: parse iCalendar and vCards in Python3
description:
parse iCalendar and vCards in Python3
Parses iCalendar and vCard files into Python3 data structures, decoding the
relevant encodings. Also serializes vobject data structures to valid iCalendar
or vCard unicode strings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-vobject because parse iCalendar and vCards in Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-vobject as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-vobject with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-vobject --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
